_license: Public OECD National Contact Points specific instances (OECD Watch + OECD MNE Guidelines NCP register). Each row cites a per-case source URL. CC-BY-style use; cite originals.

entries.caseTitle: Shell — Niger Delta human rights / environment (Friends of the Earth Netherlands)
entries.summary: Netherlands NCP final statement found Shell's Nigeria operations breached the OECD Guidelines on environmental and disclosure provisions tied to Niger Delta oil spills. No agreement reached.

entries.caseTitle: TotalEnergies — EACOP / Tilenga pipeline (Survie + Les Amis de la Terre)
entries.summary: French NCP accepted the specific instance against TotalEnergies on the East African Crude Oil Pipeline / Tilenga project; instance remains under follow-up monitoring as of 2024.

entries.caseTitle: BP — West Papua LNG (WALHI)
entries.summary: UK NCP closed with a final statement after BP committed to engagement protocols for the Tangguh LNG project in West Papua. Agreement reached.

entries.caseTitle: Equinor (Statoil) — Tanzanian gas contract transparency
entries.summary: Norwegian NCP final statement found Statoil/Equinor's non-publication of the Tanzanian production-sharing agreement fell short of OECD disclosure expectations.

entries.caseTitle: Glencore — Cerrejón coal mine, Colombia (Forced displacement of Wayúu and Afro-Colombian communities)
entries.summary: Swiss NCP accepted complaint against Glencore for community impacts of the Cerrejón coal mine; final statement closed without agreement on remedy.

entries.caseTitle: BHP Billiton — Cerrejón coal mine (community resettlement)
entries.summary: Australian NCP parallel complaint over Cerrejón (BHP was a Cerrejón co-owner). Final statement noted insufficient community engagement.

entries.caseTitle: Vale — Mariana / Samarco tailings dam collapse (BHP-Vale JV)
entries.summary: Brazilian NCP instance over the 2015 Samarco/Mariana tailings dam disaster (Vale–BHP JV) withdrawn after parallel domestic litigation; case noted as landmark for tailings risk.

entries.caseTitle: Rio Tinto — Bougainville / Panguna mine legacy
entries.summary: Australian NCP brokered Rio Tinto's commitment to fund an independent environmental and human rights impact assessment of the legacy Panguna mine site.

entries.caseTitle: Anglo American — Cerrejón coal mine, Colombia
entries.summary: UK NCP final statement found Anglo American failed to adequately address community grievances at the Cerrejón mine (Anglo was a co-owner).

entries.caseTitle: Barrick — Porgera mine (Papua New Guinea) sexual violence allegations
entries.summary: Canadian NCP complaint over alleged sexual violence by mine-site security at Barrick's Porgera Joint Venture; withdrawn after parallel remedy framework launched.

entries.caseTitle: Newmont — Yanacocha mine, Peru (Conga project environmental harm)
entries.summary: US NCP closed the specific instance over Newmont's Conga / Yanacocha operations without agreement; no formal finding of breach.

entries.caseTitle: Freeport — Grasberg mine, Indonesia (security forces / human rights)
entries.summary: US NCP declined to accept the Grasberg specific instance; OECD Watch criticised the rejection in its 2015 annual report.

entries.caseTitle: ING — climate-policy adequacy (Friends of the Earth NL et al.)
entries.summary: Landmark Netherlands NCP statement: agreement that ING would set climate goals consistent with Paris targets — first NCP case to link bank lending and climate.

entries.caseTitle: Rabobank — Brazilian beef sector deforestation links
entries.summary: Netherlands NCP closing statement: Rabobank committed to deforestation-screening of its Brazilian agribusiness lending.

entries.caseTitle: Credit Suisse — DAPL / Energy Transfer Partners financing
entries.summary: Swiss NCP accepted complaint over Credit Suisse financing of the Dakota Access Pipeline; closing statement reported continued disagreement on due diligence adequacy.

entries.caseTitle: Apple — DRC cobalt supply chain (RAID, IPIS)
entries.summary: UK NCP accepted complaints alleging Apple's cobalt sourcing from DRC artisanal mines fell short of OECD due-diligence standards; case under follow-up.

entries.caseTitle: Tesla — DRC cobalt supply chain (RAID, IPIS)
entries.summary: US NCP accepted parallel complaint on cobalt due diligence; specific instance ongoing.

entries.caseTitle: Samsung — Vietnam factory worker conditions (IPEN)
entries.summary: Korean NCP final statement: Samsung disputed worker-health allegations at Vietnam plants; no remedial agreement reached.

entries.caseTitle: Huawei — Uyghur surveillance / Xinjiang sourcing (Global Legal Action Network)
entries.summary: UK NCP declined to accept the Xinjiang surveillance specific instance citing inadequate connection to UK operations.

entries.caseTitle: Adidas — PT Kizone Indonesia severance (Workers Rights Consortium)
entries.summary: German NCP brokered Adidas commitment to humanitarian-aid payments to ex-PT Kizone workers following factory closure.

entries.caseTitle: H&M — Bangladesh supplier fire safety (post-Rana Plaza monitoring)
entries.summary: Swedish NCP closing statement: H&M committed to enhanced supplier-fire-safety auditing aligned with the Accord on Fire and Building Safety in Bangladesh.

entries.caseTitle: Nike — Hansae Vietnam factory dispute
entries.summary: US NCP closed Nike-Hansae instance without agreement; OECD Watch report flagged the NCP process as opaque.

entries.caseTitle: Inditex — Myanmar supplier wage theft
entries.summary: Spanish NCP accepted complaint alleging Inditex's Myanmar suppliers underpaid garment workers; instance under follow-up.

entries.caseTitle: Nestlé — Côte d'Ivoire cocoa child labour (Mighty Earth)
entries.summary: Swiss NCP closing statement: Nestlé agreed to publish supplier-tier disclosure of its cocoa supply chain and strengthen child-labour remediation.

entries.caseTitle: Unilever — Kericho tea-estate violence (Kenya)
entries.summary: UK NCP closing statement: Unilever committed to enhanced grievance mechanisms after post-election violence at Kericho tea estate (Kenya).

entries.caseTitle: JBS — Brazilian beef supply-chain deforestation
entries.summary: Brazilian NCP accepted multiple specific instances against JBS over Amazon-deforestation links in its cattle supply chain. Ongoing.

entries.caseTitle: Cargill — Brazilian soy / Cerrado deforestation (Mighty Earth)
entries.summary: US NCP closed instance against Cargill's Brazilian soy sourcing without agreement; final statement noted Cargill resisted full transparency on Cerrado suppliers.

entries.caseTitle: Bunge — Cerrado soy / deforestation
entries.summary: Netherlands NCP final statement criticised Bunge for limited adoption of zero-deforestation commitments in the Cerrado biome.

entries.caseTitle: Wilmar — Indonesian palm oil community grievances
entries.summary: Singapore NCP brokered a mediation under which Wilmar agreed to grievance-tracker disclosure and supplier suspensions for non-compliance.

entries.caseTitle: Novartis — India / South Africa access-to-medicines (Treatment Action Campaign)
entries.summary: Swiss NCP declined the specific instance, citing patent law as outside Guidelines scope. OECD Watch flagged in annual report.

entries.caseTitle: HeidelbergCement — Western Sahara operations
entries.summary: German NCP final statement found HeidelbergCement's operations in occupied Western Sahara raised unresolved human-rights questions.

entries.caseTitle: POSCO — Odisha (India) steel project displacement
entries.summary: Norwegian NCP final statement: Norges Bank Investment Management's POSCO holding lacked adequate due diligence for the disputed Odisha project.

entries.caseTitle: Heineken — DRC Bralima workers (post-war redundancy)
entries.summary: Netherlands NCP brokered settlement: Heineken paid compensation to DRC Bralima workers dismissed during the 1999 occupation period.

entries.caseTitle: Shell — Ogoniland clean-up follow-up
entries.summary: Netherlands NCP follow-up on Shell's Ogoniland clean-up obligations; OECD Watch reports progress as incomplete as of 2023.

entries.caseTitle: Glencore — DRC Kamoto copper operations (labour rights)
entries.summary: Swiss NCP closing statement on Glencore's DRC Kamoto operations identified gaps in trade-union engagement protocols.

entries.caseTitle: JBS — Brazilian Amazon meatpacker due diligence (US NCP)
entries.summary: US NCP accepted specific instance over JBS USA's sourcing exposure to Brazilian Amazon deforestation. Ongoing follow-up.
